mapper.select: /* BadwordFilterMapper.selectActiveBadwordList */ SELECT BADWORD_ID, KEYWORD, KEYWORD_NORMALIZED, CATEGORY, MATCH_TYPE, SEVERITY, SOURCE, USE_YN FROM TB_CM_SMS_BADWORD WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY BADWORD_ID
mapper.insert: /* BadwordFilterMapper.insertMessageBlock */ INSERT INTO TB_CM_SMS_MESSAGE_BLOCK ( MSG_BLOCK_ID, BLOCK_TYPE, BADWORD_ID, URL_CHECK_ID, MSG_STATUS, MSG_CONTENT, CALLBACK, S_OGN_CD, S_OGN_FG, S_USER_ID, REG_DT, REG_ID, MOD_DT, MOD_ID ) VALUES ( TB_CM_SMS_MESSAGE_BLOCK_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{blockType}, #{badwordId}, #{urlCheckId}, #{msgStatus}, #{content}, SBPENC.E(#{callback}), #{ssOrgnCd}, #{ssOrgnFg}, #{ssUserId}, #{regDt}, #{regId}, #{modDt}, #{modId} )
